description_long: This is a modern, two-seater sofa with a sleek, boxy silhouette and clean lines. The upholstery is a solid, dark color with a smooth, matte finish, giving it a contemporary and understated appearance. The sofa features two large seat cushions and two matching back cushions, all of which appear to be loose and uniform in size. The armrests are straight, padded, and rise to the same height as the backrest, providing a balanced and symmetrical look. The legs are short, block-style, and positioned at the corners, barely visible beneath the base. Overall, the design is minimalist and functional, suitable for urban environments such as lobbies, waiting areas, or outdoor covered spaces.
description: A modern, dark-colored two-seater sofa with straight armrests, loose cushions, and a minimalist, boxy design. The upholstery is smooth and matte, and the legs are short and blocky.
description_view_0: Front view showing two seat cushions, two back cushions, and straight, padded armrests on both sides.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the straight armrest and the depth of the seat and back cushions.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the continuous backrest and the tops of the back cushions, with armrests visible at both ends.
description_view_3: Opposite side view mirroring view 1, showing the straight armrest and cushion depth.
attribute_cushion_arrangement: Two large, loose seat cushions and two matching loose back cushions, all uniform in size and placed side by side.
attribute_armrest_style: Straight, padded armrests at both ends, rising to the same height as the backrest with a boxy, rectangular profile and no decorative elements.
attribute_leg_design: Four short, block-style legs positioned at the corners, minimally visible, likely made of wood or metal with a dark finish.
attribute_backrest_type: Medium-height, straight, continuous backrest with two loose back cushions resting against it, no tufting or segmentation.
attribute_upholstery_pattern: Solid color upholstery with a smooth, matte texture and no visible pattern or decorative stitching.
